details.name: Test 6 - Regression Validation
details.regression_result: Next version installed successfully on Arm64
details.comparison: Current pinned OpenJ9 version 17.0.17 passed smoke tests in this run. Regression validation downloaded the candidate Arm64 JDK from https://github.com/ibmruntimes/semeru17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.18%2B8.1_openj9-0.57.0/ibm-semeru-open-jdk_aarch64_linux_17.0.18.1.tar.gz, and the extracted candidate reported version 17.0.18 and completed a real compile-and-run check successfully.
